welcome.title: 🎯 Welcome to PolyHunter, {name}!
welcome.description: 🚀 PolyHunter is your intelligent copy-trading companion for Polymarket. Automatically mirror the trades of top-performing wallets with full control over sizing, slippage, and risk limits.
welcome.balance_not_connected: 💰 Your Polymarket Balance: Not connected Use /connect to link your CLOB API credentials.
welcome.commands_header: 📋 Available Commands: /connect — Link your Polymarket API credentials /disconnect — Remove credentials and stop trading /copytrade — Manage copy-trade configurations /positions — View open positions and P&L /history — View trade log (last 20 entries) /stop — Pause all copy trading /resume — Resume copy trading /language — Change language /app — Open Mini App /help — Full command reference
help.title: 📖 PolyHunter Bot — Command Reference
help.connect: /connect — Link your Polymarket CLOB API keys (private DM only)
help.disconnect: /disconnect — Remove stored credentials and stop trading
help.resume: /resume — Resume all paused configs (private DM only)
help.positions: /positions — View your open positions and P&L
copytrade.title: ⚙️ Copy Trade Configurations
copytrade.select_or_create: Select an existing config to edit, or create a new one.
copytrade.no_configs: You have no copy-trade configs yet. Tap the button below to create one.
copytrade.error_loading: ❌ Could not load your copy-trade configurations. Please try again.
callbacks.invalid_address: Invalid Ethereum address. Must be 0x followed by 40 hex characters.
callbacks.tag_too_long: Tag must be 64 characters or fewer.
callbacks.enter_number_or_clear: Please enter a valid number, or 0 to clear.
callbacks.offset_range: Limit price offset must be between -0.99 and 0.99.
callbacks.duration_min: Limit order duration must be at least 90 seconds.
callbacks.config_not_found: ❌ Config not found. It may have been deleted.
callbacks.no_config_data: ❌ No config data found. Please start over with /copytrade.
callbacks.wallet_required: ⚠️ A valid target wallet address is required before saving.
callbacks.save_failed: ❌ Failed to save. Please try again.
callbacks.list_header: ⚙️ Copy Trade Configurations Select a config to edit, or create a new one.
callbacks.list_select: Select a config to edit, or create a new one.
callbacks.list_empty: ⚙️ Copy Trade Configurations No configs yet. Create one below.
connect.dm_only: 🔒 For security, /connect only works in a private DM with the bot. Please message me directly.
connect.disclaimer: 🔐 BEFORE YOU CONNECT: 1. We store your Polymarket CLOB API credentials (API Key, Secret, Passphrase) 2. These credentials allow us to place trades on your behalf ONLY 3. We CANNOT withdraw your funds or access your wallet 4. Your credentials are encrypted at rest with AES-256 5. You can revoke access instantly with /disconnect — credentials are permanently deleted 6. We log every trade action — view anytime with /history 7. You set your own limits (max bet size, daily budget, slippage tolerance) 8. Never share your wallet private key or seed phrase with anyone, including us To proceed, please send your API Key now. Type /cancel at any time to abort.
connect.send_api_key: 🔑 To proceed, please send your API Key now. Type /cancel at any time to abort.
connect.invalid_key: ⚠️ That doesn't look like a valid API Key. Please try again or /cancel.
connect.key_received: ✅ API Key received. Now please send your API Secret.
connect.invalid_secret: ⚠️ That doesn't look like a valid API Secret. Please try again or /cancel.
connect.secret_received: ✅ API Secret received. Now please send your Passphrase.
connect.missing_data: ❌ Missing credential data. Please start over with /connect.
connect.validation_failed: ❌ Credential validation failed. Please double-check your API Key, Secret, and Passphrase, then try again with /connect. Error: {error}
connect.store_error: ❌ An internal error occurred while storing your credentials. Please try again later or contact support.
connect.success: ✅ Connected successfully! Your Polymarket balance: {balance} You can now use /copytrade to set up copy trading. To revoke access at any time, use /disconnect.
connect.cancelled: ❌ Connection process cancelled. Your credentials were not stored.
disconnect.error: ❌ An error occurred while deleting your credentials. Please try again or contact support.
disconnect.success:
🔓 Credentials deleted. The bot will no longer trade on your behalf.
To reconnect, use /connect.
disconnect.no_credentials:
ℹ️ No active credentials found. You may already be disconnected.
Use /connect to link your API keys.
positions.error: ❌ Could not load your positions. Please try again later.
positions.empty:
📭 You have no open positions.

Use /copytrade to set up copy trading and start building positions.
history.error: ❌ Could not load your trade history. Please try again later.
history.empty:
📭 No trade history yet.

Once you set up copy trading with /copytrade, every trade action will be logged here.
stop.error: ❌ Could not load your configurations. Please try again.
stop.no_configs: ℹ️ You have no copy-trade configurations to pause.
stop.already_paused: ℹ️ All your copy-trade configs were already paused.
stop.success:
⏸️ All copy trading stopped. {count} config(s) paused.

No new trades will be placed until you /resume.
Your open positions are unaffected.
resume.dm_only: 🔒 For security, /resume only works in a private DM with the bot. Please message me directly.
resume.error: ❌ Could not load your configurations. Please try again.
resume.no_configs: ℹ️ You have no copy-trade configurations to resume. Create one with /copytrade.
resume.already_active: ℹ️ All your copy-trade configs were already active.
resume.success:
▶️ Copy trading resumed. {count} config(s) reactivated.

Circuit breaker has been reset. The bot will now copy trades again based on your configured settings.

Use /stop at any time to pause.
app.message: 📱 Open PolyHunter Dashboard Access your full copy-trading dashboard, manage configs, view positions, and track trade history — all within Telegram.
app.not_configured: ⚠️ The Mini App is not configured yet. Please contact the admin.
help.app: /app — Open the PolyHunter Mini App dashboard
